review_text: A bit of holes but overall a great place to camp. Awesome beach access and lovely scenery.

Great park close to the beach and Lake Pertobe. Would have given 5 stars except the caravan sites and laneways are a bit small and close together for a larger van. Made getting in and out of sites difficult! I was surprised vans were not better matched with sites and spaced out more.
We love it so relaxing. And Beautiful. Only thing i would like to happen is that the people of every age slow down on whatever they are riding.  Scooters , bikes etc.
I've never been to a caravan park , where I've had to do a 7 point turn , just to get in and out of my site ..... Then again , I've never been to a caravan park , where I have to share my site . ...

Great location near beach, wonderful place to camp.
Expensive.
Noise from other campers parties is an issue. Management and Security innacive.

Location was great, right on the coast with great walking trails and fishing. Booked a powered site but the box was difficult to access and a long way from our site so an extension cable is needed and unfortunately we didn't have one. Site was big enough for 2 cars and 2 small tents  Kids were having a great time in the outdoors. Staff were friendly and helpful when booking.  Couldn't find a camp kitchen? Shower block was clean and laundry room available. If you go in high season expect it to be busy. I would definately go again but be better prepared.

To those who like a family oriented place to holiday at this is the place for you , also those who don't like change in the place that they stay at regularly or however often you go this is also the place for you . I hadn't been to shipwreck Bay holiday park in 20 years and aside from a few minor things not much has changed and it was fantastic, I absolutely loved that it was just how I remembered it from when I was a kid . We went with another family and aside from the cold wind and a little wet weather ( having said that it is warrnambool after all lol )we all loved the stay just a pity it wasn't long enough , my family will without a doubt be back here again and the park / play ground across the road was amazing for the kids they had a ball there . For location to a clean beach 10 out of 10 ( men's toilet block )  cleanliness in the toilet block 10/10 and nostalgic rating 10/10  the staff were all very friendly and helpful keep it up shipwreck Bay holiday park as always the stay is and was mint 👌
Great caravan park in a fantastic location. Beachside with loads of parks and lake across the road

Stayed here Jan 2025 for a week in Tent. the site unfortunately had a lot of dirt and barely any grass. It was hard to keep the tent and kids clean as no matter what dirt was everywhere. other sites looked a lot better.

pros: close to the beach, mornings are peaceful, kids parks and lots to do around, kiosk has most of everything, showers/bathroom were good enough.

cons: Noisy teenagers (one night they were drinking/talking till 3am), site wasn’t great, had a few teenagers try and steal our stuff from behind the tent late in the night (lock your stuff up), sometimes looks like the bathrooms/showers haven’t been cleaned for a few days.

Overall we had a good time and will most likely go back when the kids are older and I have a better set up. 6.5/10
Great place for a family holiday at the beach. With lake pertobe over the road and easy beach access, this place has the location well and truly sorted.

The park itself is kinda fine, however if you are after a peaceful time this is not the place for you; there are no rules or anything in regard's to behaviour and noise. Families/groups around us played music way too late at night, parents were arguing and kids were in the shared showers playing music so loud you couldn’t talk to each other (I wish that was an exaggeration). I strongly recommend a different park.

Jan2-5 2023 Sites were very small and crowded found it hard to park van due to it being very tight.
No sullage points tap was hard against the tree so it was difficult to connect hose.
Facilities could have been cleaner toilet paper stuck walls and not cleaned off showers could be cleaner.
Very noisy on one night and nothing was done to stop noise and loud music.
Location was good but would not stay again. Over priced over rated
It's a great place to stay. Fantastic for families.
The most friendly staff only happy to help 😁
